message:
type: PROPOSE

note: Adding process_priority param to click.edit()/Editor class

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: I'm implementing click.edit() multi-file support in _termui_impl.py and termui.py. What files does your feature touch?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
your_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Our features both touch these 2 files and can't be split further (edit_files vs process_priority). Accepting overlap - both implement independently, commit/push, then whoever merges second resolves conflicts by hand since changes are orthogonal (different params/methods).

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
your_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Same two files needed for both features. Since they overlap on Editor.__init__ and edit(), I'll add process_priority as a new keyword-only trailing param (additive, minimal line changes) so it merges cleanly with your filenames support. Will do a manual merge reconciliation pass after both are done.

type: DONE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Implemented process_priority param on Editor.__init__ and edit(). Added _set_process_priority helper + call site in Editor.edit_file after Popen. Changes are additive/isolated to constructor + one new method + one call line, should merge cleanly with your filenames feature.

type: DONE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Implemented multi-file support: renamed Editor.edit_file -> edit_files(filenames: Iterable[str]), edit_files joins quoted filenames as separate subprocess args. termui.edit() filename param now accepts str | Iterable[str] | None (str is special-cased into a 1-tuple). Pushed to team/agent1. Ready to merge - let me know when your process_priority changes are pushed so I can pull and reconcile.

type: DONE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Pushed to team/agent2 (commit e0a824b). Note: you renamed edit_file->edit_files; I added a new edit_file method with priority-setting via self._set_process_priority(pid) called right after subprocess.Popen. I'll merge team/agent1 now and reconcile by moving the _set_process_priority call into your edit_files method.

type: DONE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Merged team/agent2 into agent1, resolved conflicts by keeping edit_files() (multi-file support) with your _set_process_priority helper called after Popen inside it. Both features verified working together, full test suite passes. patch.txt generated from merged tree and pushed.
